html:
AMZN Amazon.com, Inc. (~$259.7) HIGH RISK

⇗ Top

Price: ~$259.7 | Entry Zone: $205–215

Technicals

  • Price is currently at an all-time high, trading above the long-term upward trendline.
  • RSI is in overbought territory (above 70), indicating potential for a near-term pullback.
  • The purple/orange oscillator lines have crossed, but the current extension suggests the momentum may be overextended.
  • Recent price action shows a strong vertical move without a significant retest of support levels.

News & Financials

  • Earnings events (marked with 'E' on the chart) have historically triggered volatility.
  • Market sentiment is currently bullish, but the stock is trading at a premium relative to its recent consolidation phase.

Assessment

  • Buy level: Wait for a pullback to the 205-215 support zone or a consolidation period to cool off the RSI.
  • Risk: High risk of a 'buy high' scenario; the stock is extended from its trendline support, increasing the probability of a mean-reversion correction.
  • Action: Maintain 0.0% allocation. Do not initiate a position at current levels; wait for a confirmed retest of the trendline or a cooling of the RSI indicator.
action: Maintain 0.0% allocation. Do not initiate a position at current levels; wait for a confirmed retest of the trendline or a cooling of the RSI indicator.

html:
BE Bloom Energy Corporation (~$226.37) HIGH RISK

⇗ Top

Price: ~$226.37 | Entry Zone: $120–130

Technicals

  • Price is currently extended significantly above the long-term upward diagonal trendline.
  • RSI is showing a bearish crossover with the purple line crossing below the orange line in overbought territory.
  • Recent price action shows a sharp pullback from recent highs, indicating potential exhaustion.
  • The most recent 'Buy' signal occurred well below current levels, suggesting the current price is far from the optimal entry point.

News & Financials

  • The stock has experienced high volatility, characteristic of growth-stage energy technology companies.
  • Market sentiment is currently sensitive to interest rate environments and capital expenditure cycles in the energy sector.

Assessment

  • Buy level: Wait for a retest of the upward diagonal trendline, currently projected near the 120-130 range.
  • Risk: High risk of mean reversion given the steep vertical ascent and bearish RSI divergence.
  • Action: Hold current 0.9% position; do not add at these levels. Consider taking partial profits if the price breaks below the immediate short-term support levels to lock in gains from the recent rally.
action: Hold current 0.9% position; do not add at these levels. Consider taking partial profits if the price breaks below the immediate short-term support levels to lock in gains from the recent rally.

html:
DGRO iShares Core Dividend Growth ETF (~$72.66) WAIT

⇗ Top

Price: ~$72.66 | Entry Zone: $70.50 – 71.80

Technicals

  • The RSI (purple line) is currently at 58.11 and has recently crossed above its orange signal line, indicating bullish momentum.
  • Price action shows a recovery from a recent dip to the $69 level, now approaching previous resistance near $73-$74.
  • A green 'Buy' signal dot was recently triggered in late April, supporting the current upward move.
  • The long-term trend remains intact with a series of higher lows visible since late 2023.

News & Financials

  • DGRO focuses on companies with a history of sustained dividend growth, providing a defensive tilt.
  • Low expense ratio (0.08%) makes it an efficient vehicle for long-term core portfolio exposure.
  • Dividend growth stocks often act as a hedge during periods of moderate inflation and market uncertainty.

Assessment

  • Buy level: Wait for a minor pullback to the $71.50 support area or a confirmed breakout above $74.00.
  • Risk: Exposure to interest rate sensitivity and potential sector-specific pullbacks in dividend-paying equities.
  • Action: Hold current 1.8% allocation. Since this is a core ETF, there is room to increase the position size, but wait for a better entry closer to $71.50 to improve the average cost basis before reaching a target 3-5% allocation.
action: Hold current 1.8% allocation. Since this is a core ETF, there is room to increase the position size, but wait for a better entry closer to $71.50 to improve the average cost basis before reaching a target 3-5% allocation.

GLD SPDR Gold Shares (~$421.91) WAIT

⇗ Top

Price: ~$421.91 | Entry Zone: $390–405

Technicals

  • Price is currently in a corrective phase after failing to sustain highs near 500.
  • The RSI purple line has crossed below the orange line, indicating bearish momentum.
  • Recent 'Sell' signal dots on the chart suggest continued downward pressure.
  • The trend structure has shifted from a clear uptrend to a consolidation/distribution phase.

News & Financials

  • Gold prices are highly sensitive to real interest rates and central bank policy.
  • Geopolitical uncertainty often drives demand for GLD, but current technicals suggest a cooling off period.

Assessment

  • Buy level: Look for a stabilization near the 400 support level or a bullish crossover on the RSI.
  • Risk: Moderate to High; the asset is currently in a downtrend on the daily timeframe.
  • Action: Hold current 2.7% allocation. Do not add to the position until the RSI shows a clear bullish crossover and the price action forms a higher low.
action: Hold current 2.7% allocation. Do not add to the position until the RSI shows a clear bullish crossover and the price action forms a higher low.

html:
GOOG Alphabet Inc. (GOOG) (~$347.5) HIGH RISK

⇗ Top

Price: ~$347.5 | Entry Zone: $320–330

Technicals

  • RSI is currently at 70.49, indicating overbought conditions.
  • Price is trading significantly above the most recent diagonal trendline support.
  • The purple RSI line has crossed above the orange line, but is now extended, suggesting potential for a pullback or consolidation.
  • Recent 'Buy' signals have already occurred, and the stock is currently at a local high.

News & Financials

  • Earnings (E) markers are present on the chart, indicating historical volatility around these dates.
  • As a mega-cap tech stock, GOOG is sensitive to broader market sentiment and interest rate expectations.

Assessment

  • Buy level: Wait for a retest of the trendline support near 320-330 or a cooling off of the RSI below 60.
  • Risk: High risk of a mean reversion due to the overextended RSI and the stock trading well above its established trendline.
  • Action: Hold current 4.5% allocation. Do not add at these levels; consider taking partial profits if the RSI begins to roll over, as the current price is at a short-term peak.
action: Hold current 4.5% allocation. Do not add at these levels; consider taking partial profits if the RSI begins to roll over, as the current price is at a short-term peak.

HIMS Hims & Hers Health, Inc. (~$27.91) WAIT

⇗ Top

Price: ~$27.91 | Entry Zone: $22.00–24.00

Technicals

  • Price recently broke above a long-term diagonal downtrend resistance line, signaling a potential trend reversal.
  • RSI is currently at 64.53, showing strong momentum but approaching overbought territory, suggesting a potential short-term pullback.
  • The most recent signal dot is a 'Buy' followed by a 'Sell' signal, indicating volatility near the current breakout point.
  • The purple/orange RSI lines are currently converging, which may signal a loss of immediate upward momentum.

News & Financials

  • The stock has shown significant volatility, typical of growth-stage companies in the telehealth sector.
  • Market sentiment for HIMS is highly sensitive to growth projections and competitive pressures in the weight loss and hair loss markets.

Assessment

  • Buy level: Wait for a retest of the broken trendline or a consolidation near the 22.00-24.00 support area.
  • Risk: High volatility; the stock is currently extended from its recent breakout point, increasing the risk of a 'bull trap' or immediate correction.
  • Action: Hold current 0.7% position. Do not add at current levels; wait for a pullback to confirm support before increasing allocation.
action: Hold current 0.7% position. Do not add at current levels; wait for a pullback to confirm support before increasing allocation.

html:
IREN Iris Energy Limited (~$44.44) WAIT

⇗ Top

Price: ~$44.44 | Entry Zone: $32.00–36.00

Technicals

  • Price recently rejected the upper descending trendline resistance near the $52 level.
  • The RSI purple line has crossed below the orange signal line, indicating a shift toward bearish momentum.
  • A 'Sell' signal dot appeared following the rejection of the upper trendline.
  • The stock is currently consolidating within a large wedge pattern and is trading in the middle of the range.

News & Financials

  • IREN is a Bitcoin miner whose stock price is highly correlated with BTC price volatility.
  • The company is actively expanding into AI and High-Performance Computing (HPC) data centers to diversify revenue.
  • Post-halving economics require high operational efficiency to maintain margins in the mining sector.

Assessment

  • Buy level: Look for entries near the lower support trendline between $32 and $36, or a confirmed breakout above the upper trendline.
  • Risk: High volatility due to crypto-market exposure and the risk of a breakdown below the current consolidation pattern.
  • Action: Hold the current 1.1% allocation. Do not add to the position at this level as the RSI crossover and trendline rejection suggest further downside toward support is likely.
action: Hold the current 1.1% allocation. Do not add to the position at this level as the RSI crossover and trendline rejection suggest further downside toward support is likely.

html:
LLY Eli Lilly and Company (~$874.29) NOT YET

⇗ Top

Price: ~$874.29 | Entry Zone: $825–850

Technicals

  • The stock is currently in a significant corrective phase, having dropped from peaks above $1,100.
  • RSI purple line is currently below the orange signal line and trending downward toward the 30 level.
  • Price action shows a series of lower highs and lower lows, indicating a short-term bearish trend.
  • Recent 'Sell' signals on the chart have been followed by continued price weakness.

News & Financials

  • Strong long-term growth driven by GLP-1 medications (Zepbound and Mounjaro).
  • High valuation multiples make the stock sensitive to broader market rotations and interest rate outlooks.
  • Recent earnings reports and competitive landscape shifts in the weight-loss sector are driving volatility.

Assessment

  • Buy level: Wait for the RSI purple line to cross back above the orange line and for price to find support near the $850 level.
  • Risk: Downside momentum remains strong; entering too early risks 'catching a falling knife' before a true bottom is established.
  • Action: With a 0.0% current allocation, remain on the sidelines. Do not initiate a position until the RSI shows a bullish crossover and the downward price momentum decelerates.
action: With a 0.0% current allocation, remain on the sidelines. Do not initiate a position until the RSI shows a bullish crossover and the downward price momentum decelerates.

html:
NVDA NVIDIA Corporation (~$213.17) HIGH RISK

⇗ Top

Price: ~$213.17 | Entry Zone: $165–175

Technicals

  • RSI is currently at 72.03, indicating overbought conditions.
  • The purple RSI line is currently above the orange signal line, but nearing a potential bearish crossover.
  • Price has recently broken above the long-term diagonal resistance trendline, which often leads to a retest of that level.
  • The stock is currently at a local high, making the risk-to-reward ratio unfavorable for new entries.

News & Financials

  • NVDA remains a leader in the AI hardware space, driving significant market momentum.
  • High valuation multiples require consistent earnings beats to justify current price levels.

Assessment

  • Buy level: Wait for a pullback to the 165-175 range, which aligns with the previous diagonal trendline resistance-turned-support.
  • Risk: High; the stock is currently overextended and trading at an RSI level that historically precedes consolidation or pullbacks.
  • Action: Hold current 1.4% position. Do not add at these levels due to overbought conditions. Consider taking partial profits if the RSI shows a clear bearish crossover or if the price fails to hold the recent breakout level.
action: Hold current 1.4% position. Do not add at these levels due to overbought conditions. Consider taking partial profits if the RSI shows a clear bearish crossover or if the price fails to hold the recent breakout level.

SLV iShares Silver Trust (~$66.2) WAIT

⇗ Top

Price: ~$66.2 | Entry Zone: $60.00–64.00

Technicals

  • Price has recently broken below the primary long-term diagonal trendline, indicating a shift in trend structure.
  • The most recent signal on the chart is a 'Sell' dot, suggesting downward momentum.
  • The RSI purple line is trending downward and is currently below the orange line, confirming bearish momentum.
  • The stock is currently trading below the significant diagonal support line that guided the previous uptrend.

News & Financials

  • SLV tracks the spot price of silver, which is highly sensitive to macroeconomic factors like interest rates and industrial demand.
  • Silver often exhibits high volatility; the recent breakdown suggests a potential correction phase following the peak near 110.

Assessment

  • Buy level: Look for a stabilization near the 60-62 support area or a bullish crossover of the RSI lines.
  • Risk: High; the breakdown of the long-term trendline suggests the potential for further downside before a sustainable bottom is formed.
  • Action: Hold current 2.5% allocation. Do not add to the position until the price reclaims the trendline or shows a clear reversal signal, as the current technical setup favors further consolidation or decline.
action: Hold current 2.5% allocation. Do not add to the position until the price reclaims the trendline or shows a clear reversal signal, as the current technical setup favors further consolidation or decline.

SOFI SoFi Technologies, Inc. (~$18.36) WAIT

⇗ Top

Price: ~$18.36 | Entry Zone: $15.00–16.00

Technicals

  • Price is currently trading below the major downward trendline established from the previous highs.
  • The RSI indicator shows the purple line crossing below the orange line, suggesting weakening momentum.
  • Recent 'Buy' signal occurred near the support trendline, but the stock is struggling to maintain upward momentum above $18.00.
  • The stock is currently in a corrective phase following a significant decline from the $30+ levels.

News & Financials

  • SoFi operates in the competitive fintech sector, which is highly sensitive to interest rate environments.
  • Earnings volatility remains a key factor for the stock, as indicated by the 'E' markers on the chart.

Assessment

  • Buy level: Look for a retest of the lower diagonal support trendline near $15.00-$16.00 if the current consolidation fails.
  • Risk: High volatility; failure to break above the downward trendline could lead to a retest of recent lows.
  • Action: Hold current 2.1% position. Do not add until the price decisively breaks and holds above the downward trendline with a positive RSI crossover.

Price: ~$376.02 | Entry Zone: $340–360

Technicals

  • Recent 'Buy' signal dot indicates potential momentum, but price is currently testing a resistance area near previous consolidation levels.
  • RSI is neutral at 50.84, showing no clear overbought or oversold condition to justify an immediate entry.
  • The purple RSI line is hovering near the orange signal line without a definitive bullish crossover.
  • Price action shows a series of lower highs since the peak, suggesting the broader downtrend remains intact.

News & Financials

  • Earnings (E) markers are present on the chart, indicating volatility around reporting dates.
  • Tesla remains highly sensitive to macroeconomic interest rate environments and EV sector competition.

html:
VEA Vanguard FTSE Developed Markets ETF (~$67.73) WAIT

⇗ Top

Price: ~$67.73 | Entry Zone: $64.00–66.00

Technicals

  • Price is currently testing a recent local high, showing signs of stalling near the 68.00 level.
  • RSI indicator shows the purple line is trending downward and is currently below the orange signal line, suggesting weakening momentum.
  • The most recent 'Buy' signal occurred at a lower price point, and the current price is extended from that entry.
  • The overall trend remains bullish, but the current price action is consolidating after a sharp recovery from the March lows.

News & Financials

  • VEA provides broad exposure to developed markets outside the US, making it sensitive to global macroeconomic conditions and interest rate policies.
  • As an ETF, its performance is tied to the aggregate health of major international economies, which are currently navigating inflationary pressures and central bank policy shifts.

Assessment

  • Buy level: Wait for a pullback toward the 65.00-66.00 support area or a bullish crossover on the RSI.
  • Risk: Moderate; the asset is currently in a consolidation phase and could see a short-term correction if it fails to break above the 68.00 resistance.
  • Action: Hold current 2.6% position. Do not add at current levels as the momentum is cooling; wait for a clearer entry signal or a dip to improve the cost basis.
action: Hold current 2.6% position. Do not add at current levels as the momentum is cooling; wait for a clearer entry signal or a dip to improve the cost basis.

Technicals

  • Price is currently near recent highs, showing signs of stalling with a slight pullback from the 58.50 level.
  • RSI indicator shows the purple line crossing below the orange line, suggesting weakening momentum.
  • The chart shows a series of 'Sell' signals appearing near the current price level.
  • The asset is in a clear long-term uptrend, but is currently extended from the primary trendline support.

News & Financials

  • VWO provides broad exposure to emerging markets, which are highly sensitive to US Dollar strength and global interest rate policies.

  • Risk: Moderate to High; the asset is currently overextended and showing bearish divergence on the RSI.

VXUS Vanguard Total International Stock ETF (~$81.89) WAIT

⇗ Top

Price: ~$81.89 | Entry Zone: $76.00–78.00

Technicals

  • Price is currently near recent highs, showing signs of stalling after a strong uptrend.
  • RSI purple line is trending downward and has crossed below the orange signal line, indicating weakening momentum.
  • The most recent 'Buy' signal occurred lower in the range; current price is extended from that support.
  • The chart shows a series of higher highs and higher lows, but the recent price action is consolidating below the peak.

News & Financials

  • VXUS provides broad exposure to international markets, making it sensitive to global macroeconomic conditions and currency fluctuations.
  • As an ETF, its performance is tied to the aggregate performance of thousands of international companies rather than individual corporate earnings.

Assessment

  • Buy level: Look for a pullback toward the 76.00-78.00 support area where previous 'Buy' signals were generated.
  • Risk: Moderate; the asset is currently extended from its recent support levels and momentum is cooling.
  • Action: Hold current 3.1% allocation. Do not add at current levels; wait for a clearer signal from the RSI (a bullish crossover) or a retest of lower support levels before increasing exposure.
